commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex app-server rate-limit reset formatting/cache propagation and internal reply metadata so runtime failure notices can be delivered through message-tool-only chat replies, with Telegram/auto-reply tests, docs, and changelog.

Reproducibility: no. live Codex subscription-limit reproduction was run. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main suppresses message-tool-only final replies and does not preserve Codex rate-limit reset snapshots for runtime failure notices.
